settings.heading: Monstera Thai Constellation
settings.description: A stunning variegated Monstera with creamy-white splashes across every leaf. Each plant is unique. Thrives in bright, indirect light and ships safely nationwide.

settings.title: Find the right light
settings.text: Most houseplants prefer bright, indirect light. Keep them near a window but out of harsh direct sun.

settings.title: Water with confidence
settings.text: Check the top 2–3cm of soil before watering. Most plants prefer to dry out slightly between drinks.

settings.title: Feed the growth
settings.text: Use a balanced liquid fertiliser during spring and summer. Ease off in autumn and winter when growth slows.

settings.heading: Plant care, simplified
settings.subheading: Everything you need to keep your plants thriving
